summary: Frontend-only verification of Paneltec mobile v160.0.21 four-bug hotfix (sticky back on /forms/category, SafeArea top, Forms Library visual differentiation, tab bar contrast). Live Playwright verification at 390x844 as admin. All 4 bugs verified fixed; all regressions pass.

test_results.BUG-1_sticky_back_on_category: PASS - [data-testid='back-btn'] is SIBLING of ScrollView (backInsideScroll=false). backY.top=12 before scroll AND backY.top=12 after scrolling [data-testid='category-page-general'] to bottom (scrolled 40/808px; scrollView is 768 tall). Back stays visible.
test_results.BUG-2_safe_area_top: PASS (structural) - SafeAreaView edges={['top']} present in both library.tsx and category/[key].tsx. app/_layout.tsx has <StatusBar style='light' translucent backgroundColor='transparent'>. Notch overlap not pixel-testable in web preview per request note.
test_results.BUG-3_library_visual_differentiation: PASS - /forms/library SafeAreaView bg = rgb(36,52,71) = #243447 (Colors.libraryBg). Each cat-card-* bg = rgb(46,36,25) = #2E2419 (Colors.tileWarm). Distinct from Home Colors.bg (#0B1425). Same tokens applied on /forms/category/general (safeBg #243447, row bg #2E2419).
test_results.BUG-4_tab_bar_contrast: PASS - Tab bar backgroundColor=rgb(2,6,23) = #020617 (Colors.surfaceDark). borderTopColor=rgb(30,41,59) = #1E293B (Colors.borderMuted). borderTopWidth=1px. Inactive tint = Colors.textSecondary (#E2E8F0) confirmed in (tabs)/_layout.tsx source.
test_results.Regression_library_sticky_back: PASS - [data-testid='library-back-btn'] present as sibling of ScrollView.
test_results.Regression_2x3_grid: PASS - 6 cat-card-* testids rendered (general, pre_start, inspection, near_miss, incident, toolbox).
test_results.Regression_row_navigation: PASS - Tapping form-row-{id} on /forms/category/general navigates to /forms/fill/{id}. 10 rows listed in General.
test_results.Version_marker: PASS - Home overline reads 'PANELTEC CIVIL · paneltec-v160.0.21'.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: library.tsx sticky header only wraps the Back button; category/[key].tsx sticky header wraps Back + heading. Slightly inconsistent (library shows a plain back bar with no title in the sticky region), though intentional per the design. Consider adding the 'Forms Library' heading to library.tsx sticky region for parity.
Console warnings (unrelated to this hotfix): 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow); props.pointerEvents deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Non-blocking RN Web deprecation noise.
context_for_next_testing_agent: For sticky-back verification, use element.scrollTop = element.scrollHeight to scroll the inner ScrollView (page mouse wheel does not scroll RN Web ScrollViews reliably). Convert hex to rgb() for getComputedStyle checks: #243447=rgb(36,52,71), #2E2419=rgb(46,36,25), #020617=rgb(2,6,23), #1E293B=rgb(30,41,59).
